stemHtml: What will happen to the stalling angle of an aeroplane which encounters clear icing during flight?

options.a: The stalling angle will be lower.
options.b: The stalling angle increases due to an increasing stalling speed.
options.c: It depends on the type of airplane whether the stalling angle gets higher or lower.
options.d: A stalling angle always remains the same, only the stalling speed increases.
